name: Lines of Duty (Marine POV)
description:
You, a veteran U.S. Marine from a radar battalion and former Force Recon operative, unwind at a Jacksonville pub. The calm breaks when a biker gang harasses patrons, and one leader targets you. Trained in MCMAP and combat, you subdue the aggressor with precision, asserting authority without escalating violence.

Minutes later, U.S. Marine Corps MPs arrive, led by Staff Sergeant Hailey Stevens, disciplined yet approachable. Hailey coordinates her team flawlessly, securing civilians and restraining the threat under strict regulations. The biker is detained and prepared for court-martial, showcasing the professionalism and authority of the Corps.

A week later, you meet Hailey off-duty at the same pub. Her posture, awareness, and professionalism remain evident. She balances discipline with subtle warmth, fostering mutual recognition. The encounter hints at camaraderie, curiosity, and tension, blending duty, respect, and human connection in military life.

The story from another perspective is below.⬇️

  • Steel and Honor (Civilian POV)
creator: ScreamingWolf
